entries.title: Clawing back from an App Store rejection — bug fixes, full iPad redesign, and resubmission
entries.summary: Apple rejected the app under Guideline 2.1(a) for two broken flows on iPad Air. Diagnosed root causes, fixed both bugs, redesigned the entire iPad experience with size-class-aware scaling, and resubmitted to App Review.

entries.title: v1.1 Release Prep — New Buddy Avatars, Performance Fixes, and App Store Submission
entries.summary: Shipped a massive visual overhaul of buddy avatars in a new outlined cartoon style, fixed reroll cooldown on activity completion, optimized DateFormatters and timer frequencies, rebuilt the share card with SwiftUI ImageRenderer, and prepped the v1.1 App Store submission with new metadata and updated icon.

entries.title: Crumpled paper physics, boredom buddy avatars, and streamlined kid switching
entries.summary: Major visual polish day — redesigned the paper balls to look like real crumpled paper, added a full avatar system with six unique animal 'Boredom Buddies,' and simplified the kid-switching flow from three steps to one.

entries.title: Massive polish day — sharing, detail redesign, bug fixes, and 57 new tests
entries.summary: Overhauled the detail screen with road trip branding and splash animations, shipped activity sharing with branded cards and pretty URLs, audited and improved 665+ activities, squashed 15 bugs, and added 57 unit tests.
